description: Explicit unsubscribe / opt-out language (T7 / UNSUBSCRIBE). Must be matched deterministically by det-unsub-001, create a durable DNC intent (ORGANISATION_DNC), and block any reply draft pending suppression verification - no transmission occurs.

input.reply_subject: Re: Quick question about your sales pipeline
input.reply_text: Please unsubscribe me from this list. Do not contact me again.
input.reply_text_snippet: Please unsubscribe me from this list. Do not contact me again.

draft.notes_mention: may be transmitted only after suppression has been verified complete

expected.notes: det-unsub-001 matches 'unsubscribe' (and prefilter.is_unsubscribe_language is also true via the same regex family in Section F, though Section A's own combined-text match is what fires first). durable_dnc_intent=true and address_suppression_intent=ORGANISATION_DNC are intents only - external_action_status stays NOT_PERFORMED, no Instantly call is made. reply_draft_status=BLOCKED_PENDING_SUPPRESSION_VERIFICATION enforces that the confirmation reply cannot be sent before suppression is verified (policy-HMZ-1.2 Section 7).
